creator: bsam@passap.ru
text:
Hi and sorry for a delay.

I think that the consensus was that:
a) a drop-in replacement is preferred;
b) Hiroki Sato (the tex ports maintainer) is working on it.

So I think that we may wait for a while.

Hiroki-san, should I switch this PR to you?
-- 
WBR, Boris Samorodov (bsam)
FreeBSD Committer, http://www.FreeBSD.org The Power To Serve
